dashboard.label: Sorry - the Canary app appears to not be installed

panel.html:
If you have been redirected to this page, then it means that the Canary app is not installed on this Splunk instance.
the Canary app is a required app for the Cisco CDR Reporting and Analytics app. As of this writing Canary runs on any Splunk version from 7.0 through the current 8.X version. Also know that Canary can absolutely be installed on Splunk Cloud instances although there can be much confusion about this so contact us at support@sideviewapps.com if we can help sort things out.
Next steps:
Return to the Cisco CDR app's install docs for details on how to get and install the Canary app.
